Do you want to reach your financial goals with confidence?
Wiser Wealth Management in Marietta, Georgia specializes in both Wealth Management and Flat Fee Financial Planning with no product sales or commissions, so you can confidently reach your financial goals.
Schedule a Meeting
Financial advice tailored to your specific needs.

All of your financial planning needs in one place. ​
We help you determine which path is best for you.​
Wealth Management​
Are you looking for portfolio management with comprehensive financial planning?
Wiser offers a unique and total wealth management experience including portfolio management and comprehensive financial planning that is tailored to your specific needs. We have a team of financial advisors, a network of trusted CPAs, and attorneys to guide you through every aspect of life, so you can achieve financial freedom. With unlimited access to your dedicated financial advisor, you’ll always have guidance when you need it most.
We’ll develop a portfolio that is aligned with your financial plan, so you can focus on what matters. With our services, you will be able to relax and enjoy life knowing that your finances are in good hands.
Learn More
Financial Planning​​ Only
Do you manage your own finances but want professional advice on a specific topic?
Financial planning is a necessary and important part of life, but it doesn’t have to be hard. You can get advice from a financial advisor who knows how to guide you toward your goals. We’re here to provide the support you need to stay on the path to achieve financial freedom.
Working with a financial advisor can seem like a daunting task, but it doesn’t have to be. We’ll take the time to get to know you and understand your unique needs so that we can provide tailored advice to help you meet your specific goals. With our financial planning, we equip you to make confident decisions about your financial future.
Learn More
Meet the Marietta Financial Advisors who will guide you through every stage of your financial journey.

3 Steps to Gain Confidence in Your Financial Future​

Schedule a Consultation with a Financial Advisor
We want to get a sense of who you are and what your goals for the future might be. We will gather detailed information about you.
2
Design a Custom Financial Plan Together
We work with you to create a personalized financial plan covering everything from retirement, investments, and more.
3
Implement the Plan and Monitor​ your Progress
Our team is dedicated and available for anything that may arise during your journey with us! You get to focus on what’s important in life.

My wife and I recently moved the the area and need to work with a management company in Ga. I was sold on our 1st visit, Very thorough,. They take the time to understand your investment goals and retirement plans.
Chip B.
2 months ago
Our experience with Wiser Wealth has been extremely "comforting" which says a lot for a firm that is talking with you about your money. From the initial introduction meeting with Casey to our follow-up meetings with William and Grace, they have been professional, personable and efficient in mapping out a pre-retirement plan. No hard sells (as they are strictly a fiduciary) and really focused on what would be best for us as their client. Everything presented to us were recommendations, not scare-tactic directives. From watching their YouTube clips and listening to their podcast, they present themselves as genuine and transparent. We feel better prepared as we approach retirement and hope to continue the relationship under their wealth management product. Highly recommended!
Bea B.
2 months ago
I have been widowed for 2 years. My husband always handled finances perfectly. I could never do that so my brother recommended Wiser Wealth. I don’t even have to think or worry about anything. It’s all taken care of and I’ve had a great year.

Important Disclosure: The above reviews feed directly in real time and are sorted by newest to oldest. These reviews are from our business page on Google, a third-party review aggregator. We do not control or curate the content, although we do respond to new reviews. All reviews appear to be client testimonials, although reviews could be posted by non-clients who want to endorse our services. We are not able to confirm the identities of reviewers and we do not compensate anyone for their review.
What Makes Wiser Wealth Management the Best Choice for You?​
Fiduciary Advisors
At Wiser, being a fiduciary means we are legally responsible to act in your best interest and cannot put our own interest ahead of yours. That’s a responsibility we take very seriously, and it drives everything we do for our clients.
Portfolio Management
We provide comprehensive portfolio management paired with financial planning, which is included in our fee. You can worry less about money and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with investment management.
Financial Planning
A financial plan is the first step to a brighter tomorrow. It gives you a roadmap of where you’re going and how you’ll get there. And our team of financial planners can help make that plan as individualized as you are.
Simple​ & Transparent Fees
Having simple and transparent fees means there’s no need to worry about hidden costs. We have an easy fee structure based on the amount of assets we manage for you or we can use a flat fee. It’s up to you!
Schedule a Meeting
What We Do To Help​
At Wiser Wealth Management, we take a different approach to helping people with their finances. We work hard to provide unbiased advice about the products and services available so that you can make an informed decision about what is right for you.
We are committed to you. The advice we provide our clients is the same as what we’d give to a close friend or family member.​
Modern Technology to Guide You to Financial Success
Have peace of mind on the go with technology Wiser Wealth has for clients to access anywhere.
